advancedsearch-desc: Helitaan sahlan ee leh awoodaha raadinta sare [[{{#Special:Search}}]]
advancedsearch-help-incategory: ;Sharaxaad :Waxay raadisaa bogagga ku jira qaybahan. ;Ka digtoonow waxyaabaha soo socda :* Bogagga ku jira qayb-hoosaadyada kuma jiraan raadintaada. :* Tirada qaybaha waxaa lagu xaddiday 256. :* Waxaad raadin kartaa bogag ku jira qaybaha kala duwan. ;Bogga caawinta :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#Intitle_and_incategory Incategory] ;Isku-dheellitirka syntax ee raadinta caadiga ah: incategory: oo ay raacdo magaca qaybta sida incategory:Help. Isticmaal calaamado xigasho laba-labo ah haddii magaca uu leeyahay meelo bannaan: incategory:"Hidden categories".
